summary: V56.0 Discovery Exploration Engine testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Discovery grid with fog-shrouded nodes on Crystals/Herbology pages, discovery mechanic with +8 XP popup, Challenge mode with quiz questions (4 options), Mastery tracker (Novice→Student→Adept→Master), SpatialRoom atmospheric environments with room name badges, portal entry flash, particles, and scene images.
critical_code_review_comments: InteractiveModule.js: Discovery Exploration Engine working correctly - fog-shrouded nodes, +8 XP on discovery, localStorage persistence
SpatialRoom.js: Room name badges (CRYSTAL CHAMBER, HERB GARDEN SANCTUM, etc.) displaying correctly in top-left
SpatialRoom.js: Scene environment images loading correctly for Oracle, Meditation, Breathing, Herbology pages
KnowledgeChallenge component: Quiz unlocks after 3+ discoveries, generates questions from discovered items with 4 options
ModuleMastery component: Correctly tracks Novice (0-19%) → Student (20-49%) → Adept (50-79%) → Master (80-100%)
ProgressionToast.js: Minor ESLint warning about timeoutRefs.current in cleanup function (line 76) - not critical
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: V56.0 Discovery Exploration Engine fully functional. InteractiveModule powers 8 pages (Crystals, Herbology, Aromatherapy, Elixirs, Mudras, Nourishment, Reiki, Acupressure). Discovery state persists in localStorage keyed by category. Challenge mode requires 3+ discovered items. SpatialRoom provides atmospheric environments with room name badges, particles, cave walls (HOLLOW_EARTH realm), and scene images. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_v56_discovery_engine.py

backend.GET /api/rpg/milestones: PASS - Returns milestone list with progress tracking, all expected definitions present
backend.POST /api/rpg/character/gain-xp: PASS - Returns xp_gained, total_xp, level, supports multiple sources
backend.GET /api/rpg/character: PASS - Returns level, xp_current, xp_next, xp_total
backend.GET /api/crystals: PASS - Returns 12 crystals for discovery grid
backend.GET /api/herbology/herbs: PASS - Returns 12 herbs for discovery grid

frontend.Crystals discovery grid: PASS - 12 fog-shrouded nodes, Eye icons visible, tap to discover
frontend.Herbology discovery grid: PASS - 12 fog-shrouded nodes with herb garden scene background
frontend.+8 XP popup on discovery: PASS - Green sparkle popup appears after tapping fog node
frontend.Challenge mode locked: PASS - Shows 'Discover at least 3 items to unlock challenges' when <3 discovered
frontend.Challenge mode quiz: PASS - Shows quiz question with 4 options after 3+ discoveries
frontend.Mastery tracker: PASS - Shows Novice→Student progression, X/12 discovered count
frontend.SpatialRoom room name badge: PASS - CRYSTAL CHAMBER, HERB GARDEN SANCTUM, ORACLE CHAMBER, MEDITATION HALL, BREATH CHAMBER visible
frontend.SpatialRoom scene images: PASS - Atmospheric backgrounds on Oracle, Meditation, Breathing, Herbology pages
frontend.SpatialRoom particles: PASS - 59 animated elements (particles/effects) on each page
frontend.Portal entry flash: PASS - Radial gradient flash animation on room entry (SpatialRoom.js line 424-433)
